authoring_method: Generated 180 source-origin units from 60 compact-context scenario families and three operational decision lenses, then expanded them into 1200 source-linked seeds for later local factory generation.
limitations: This is CODEX_DRAFT authoring, not independent GPT/operator acceptance.
The later 100k candidate generation, streaming, digest, and absorption runs were intentionally not started.
The compact context is treated as source of truth; source_pool files were used as anchors rather than expanding the read budget into full historical reports.
return_to_parent: Operator should independently validate the pack, then run the existing local candidate factory only if this draft is accepted.
source_law: No source/proof anchor -> no memory candidate. Seeds use generated origins as source_path, and origins use only compact-context source_pool files.
